positive: A whimsical and energetic scene featuring stylized forest creatures: a fox with a playful expression, an owl perched on a stylized branch, and a mischievous raccoon playfully climbing. The art style should be a blend of sophisticated linework and vibrant, flat color blocking, reminiscent of modern Scandinavian illustration. Composition must be centrally arranged and highly symmetrical, perfect for a repeating pattern or large centerpiece print. The forest background should be abstracted with large, simplified leaf shapes and stylized geometric trees, maintaining a clean silhouette. Utilize deep forest greens, burnt oranges, sky blues, and mustard yellows for a palette that pops on fabric. Lighting should be bright and diffused, creating sharp edges and strong visual separation between subjects and background. Focus on clean, bold outlines and minimalist details for maximum print versatility. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, artifact, watermark, signature, text, logos, poorly rendered, out of focus, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, disfigured, realistic photo, grayscale
